releases.author: davidlbowman
releases.description:
## Added

- **Hierarchical Folder Export Mode**
  - New export mode: organize annotations as `Root Folder / Series / Book.md`
  - Each book gets its own markdown file with all its annotations
  - Rich YAML frontmatter with tags for series, author, and genre
  - Wikilinks for series and author names for Obsidian graph integration
  - Configurable root folder name (default: "Kavita Annotations")
- **New Settings**
  - `exportMode` - Choose between "Single file" or "Hierarchical folders"
  - `rootFolderName` - Name of the root folder for hierarchical mode
  - `deleteOrphanedFiles` - Auto-remove files when annotations are deleted
- **Path Sanitization**
  - Safe handling of special characters in series/book names
  - Windows reserved name handling (CON, PRN, etc.)
  - Automatic truncation of very long titles (200 char limit)
  - Duplicate book title handling with chapter ID suffix

## Changed

- Settings UI now shows mode-specific options (output path vs root folder)
- Sync notification shows appropriate message for each mode

## Technical

- New `HierarchicalSyncer` Effect service for folder-based sync
- New `bookFile.ts` formatter for individual book files
- New `paths.ts` utilities for path sanitization
- Added folder operations to `ObsidianAdapter`
- 167 unit tests (up from 127)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/davidlbowman/kavita-to-obsidian/compare/1.0.0...1.1.0

releases.author: davidlbowman
releases.description:
Release 1.0.0

## What's Changed
* fix: Obsidian plugin CI compliance for v1.0.0 release by @davidlbowman in https://github.com/davidlbowman/kavita-to-obsidian/pull/19


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/davidlbowman/kavita-to-obsidian/compare/v0.0.3...1.0.0

releases.author: davidlbowman
releases.description:
## Changed

- **Improved Annotation Display**
  - Chapter headings now prefixed with "Chapter:" for clarity (e.g., `#### Chapter: Four`)
  - Multi-paragraph annotations now properly blockquote each line
  - Empty notes (null, empty string, or "{}") are now excluded from output
- **Better Obsidian Tagging Defaults**
  - Default `tagPrefix` changed from `kavita/` to empty string
  - Tags now only generated for genres (e.g., `#fiction`, `#sci-fi`)
  - Removed nested tag categories (`book/`, `author/`, `series/`, `library/`)
  - Authors and books are better represented as wikilinks, not tags
- Updated settings UI description for tag prefix

## Fixed

- Multi-paragraph text now renders correctly in blockquotes
- Empty comment marker `{}` from Kavita no longer displayed as a note

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/davidlbowman/kavita-to-obsidian/compare/v0.0.2...v0.0.3

## What's Changed
* feat: improve annotation display and tagging defaults by @davidlbowman in https://github.com/davidlbowman/kavita-to-obsidian/pull/16


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/davidlbowman/kavita-to-obsidian/compare/v0.0.2...v0.0.3
releases.name: v0.0.3

releases.author: davidlbowman
releases.description:
## What's New

### Enhanced Markdown Output
- Book annotations now grouped under series headings with metadata
- Author names displayed with optional wikilinks (e.g., `[[Author Name]]`)
- Obsidian-style tags generated from genres and series

### New Formatting Settings
- **Include Comments**: Toggle personal notes with highlights
- **Include Spoilers**: Show/hide spoiler-marked annotations
- **Include Tags**: Generate tags from book metadata
- **Tag Prefix**: Customize tag prefix (default: `kavita/`)
- **Include Wikilinks**: Create links to author/series notes

### Improved Architecture
- Comprehensive test coverage (80%+ lines/statements)
- Better error handling and user feedback

### PRs in this release
- #8 feat: add v0.0.2 formatting settings
- #9 feat: enriched markdown output with real names, wikilinks, and tags
- #10 feat: add author/genre metadata and book grouping
- #11 test: add unit tests for untested services
- #12 Release v0.0.2

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/davidlbowman/kavita-to-obsidian/compare/v0.0.1...v0.0.2
releases.name: v0.0.2

releases.author: davidlbowman
releases.description:
## Initial Release

First release of Kavita to Obsidian plugin.

### Features
- Sync annotations from Kavita to Obsidian vault
- Basic markdown formatting for highlights and notes
- Plugin settings for Kavita URL and API key configuration

### PRs in this release
- #2 feat: Add KavitaClient service
- #3 feat(obsidian): add ObsidianApp context tag and ObsidianAdapter service
- #4 feat: add AnnotationFormatter and AnnotationSyncer
- #5 feat: add Obsidian plugin with integration testing
- #7 Release v0.0.1
releases.name: v0.0.1
